mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle, compressing discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A monthly unemployment rate exceeding 5.5% signals labor market weakness, reducing consumer spending and corporate profits, leading to negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances where UNRATE exceeds 5.5%.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent increases in consumer spending (RSAFS) and housing starts (HOUST) indicate strong demand, driving corporate revenues and positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns despite simultaneous RSAFS and HOUST growth.

mechanism_narrative: During high inflation regimes (CPIAUCSL > 2.5% YoY), central banks raise rates, increasing discount rates and reducing equity valuations, leading to negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns during periods when CPIAUCSL exceeds 2.5% YoY.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production (INDPRO) signals robust supply-side activity, boosting corporate earnings and positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns despite INDPRO growth.

mechanism_narrative: A quarterly GDP growth above 11000 billion dollars indicates strong economic demand, driving corporate profits and positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60d returns despite GDPC1 exceeding 11000.

mechanism_narrative: In a strong labor market regime (PAYEMS growth > 100k), increased consumer spending drives equity demand, leading to positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns during periods of PAYEMS growth > 100k.

mechanism_narrative: Combined growth in quarterly GDP (GDPC1) and monthly housing starts (HOUST) signals robust demand, boosting corporate revenues and positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns despite simultaneous GDPC1 and HOUST growth.
